name: nestjs-toolkit
description: NestJS-specific implementation of DDD, Hexagonal Architecture, and CQRS patterns. 1 skill with 9 reference topics: code structure, API design, error handling, TypeORM queries, TypeORM migrations, auth guards, config modules, NestJS domain modeling (@nestjs/cqrs), and structured logging. For language-agnostic DDD theory, use engineering-toolkit.
